report.summary: Built 2 new pages — Initia ecosystem guide and Crypto Custody Guide 2026 — researched, written, SEO-optimized, and added to PUBLISH_QUEUE.

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Researched Initia: Cosmos-based L1 for modular rollup orchestration (Minitias), $300M+ TVL, INIT token launched Apr 2025, backed by Binance Labs, supports MoveVM/EVM/WasmVM

Researched Crypto Custody landscape 2026: self-custody vs custodial vs MPC wallets, 59% institutional allocations now include self-custody, Fireblocks $6T+ transferred, Coinbase Custody SOC 1/2 audited
Verified neither topic had existing pages on degen0x — confirmed gaps in ecosystem and learn sections
Cross-referenced CoinGecko, DefiLlama, Blockworks, CoinMarketCap, and institutional reports for current data

sections.title: Content Created
items: Initia ecosystem page (301 lines): protocol overview, architecture breakdown (L1 orchestration, Minitias, OPinit Stack, Omnitia), key features, INIT tokenomics, risks, FAQ with 5 questions, internal links to 4 related pages

Crypto Custody Guide 2026 (498 lines): comprehensive learn guide covering custodial vs self-custody, hot/cold storage, MPC wallets, top provider comparison table (Coinbase Custody, Fireblocks, BitGo, Ledger), institutional trends, 15-item security checklist, FAQ with 6 questions

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Initia: ecosystem page with breadcrumb nav, internal links to /learn/modular-blockchains-guide, /learn/restaking-eigenlayer-guide, /ecosystem/eigenlayer, /learn/layer-2-scaling-guide
Custody Guide: title targeting 'crypto custody 2026', 'self custody wallet', 'MPC wallet guide' keywords
Custody Guide: Article + FAQ structured data schemas, OpenGraph article type with publishedTime
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts as Day 64 batch
